name: 2D Renderer — Step 3: MSDF text
description: Crisp scalable Roboto text rendered as MSDF glyph quads through the gpu2d Text pipeline (median-of-3 + screen-px-range AA, no MSAA), composited over rounded-box panels in one render pass. The same atlas the CPU blit path uses, uploaded once as a wgpu texture. Compiled-target only; needs wgpu-native + SDL3.
